title: Instrument Detective
description: A sound detective game where kids hear playful instrument clues and tap the matching instrument. Beta uses spoken sound effects until real instrument clips arrive.
learningGoals: Practice listening discrimination through instrument sound words
Connect instrument names with visual symbols
Notice simple sound qualities like loud, soft, jingly, and low
interactionModel: choose-one tap cards after a spoken prompt
feedbackModel: Warm spoken praise and sparkle SFX on success; a miss gets a gentle wiggle, spoken nudge, and the prompt again.
credits: Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
